question: ist all products
answer: SELECT * FROM products;

question: et all customers
answer: SELECT * FROM customers;

question: how all orders
answer: SELECT * FROM orders;

question: ist all employees
answer: SELECT * FROM employees;

question: et all offices
answer: SELECT * FROM offices;

question: how all product lines
answer: SELECT * FROM productlines;

question: ist all payments
answer: SELECT * FROM payments;

question: et product names and prices
answer: SELECT productName, buyPrice  FROM products;

question: et customer names and cities
answer: SELECT customerName, city  FROM customers;

question: ist employee first and last names
answer: SELECT firstName, lastName  FROM employees;

question: et all order dates
answer: SELECT orderDate  FROM orders;

question: how product vendor list
answer: SELECT DISTINCT productVendor  FROM products;

question: et all product codes
answer: SELECT productCode  FROM products;

question: ist all countries from offices
answer: SELECT DISTINCT country  FROM offices;

question: how all order statuses
answer: SELECT DISTINCT status  FROM orders;

question: et all payment amounts
answer: SELECT amount  FROM payments;

question: ist all job titles
answer: SELECT DISTINCT jobTitle  FROM employees;

question: et customer phone numbers
answer: SELECT customerName, phone  FROM customers;

question: how product MSRP values
answer: SELECT productName, MSRP  FROM products;

question: ist order numbers
answer: SELECT orderNumber  FROM orders;

question: et orders with customer names
answer: SELECT o.orderNumber, c.customerName  FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

question: et employees with office city
answer: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, o.city  FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode;

question: et payments with customer names
answer: SELECT p.checkNumber, p.amount, c.customerName  FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

question: et order details with product names
answer: SELECT od.orderNumber, p.productName, od.quantityOrdered  FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od.productCode = p.productCode;

question: et products with product line description
answer: SELECT p.productName, pl.textDescription  FROM products p JOIN productlines pl ON p.productLine = pl.productLine;

question: et customers with sales rep names
answer: SELECT c.customerName, e.firstName, e.lastName  FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c.salesRepEmployeeNumber = e.employeeNumber;

question: et orders with customer city
answer: SELECT o.orderNumber, c.city  FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

question: et employees and their manager
answer: SELECT e.firstName AS Employee, m.firstName AS Manager  FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

question: et orderdetails with product vendor
answer: SELECT od.orderNumber, p.productVendor  FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od.productCode = p.productCode;

question: et payments with customer country
answer: SELECT p.amount, c.country  FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

question: ount customers per country
answer: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS customerCount  FROM customers  GROUP BY country;

question: otal payments per customer
answer: SELECT customerNumber, SUM(amount) AS totalPaid  FROM payments  GROUP BY customerNumber;

question: umber of orders per status
answer: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS orderCount  FROM orders  GROUP BY status;

question: roducts per product line
answer: SELECT productLine, COUNT(*) AS productCount  FROM products  GROUP BY productLine;

question: mployees per office
answer: SELECT officeCode, COUNT(*) AS employeeCount  FROM employees  GROUP BY officeCode;

question: otal stock per product vendor
answer: SELECT productVendor, SUM(quantityInStock) AS totalStock  FROM products  GROUP BY productVendor;

question: verage buy price per product line
answer: SELECT productLine, AVG(buyPrice) AS avgPrice  FROM products  GROUP BY productLine;

question: rders per customer
answer: SELECT customerNumber, COUNT(*) AS orderCount  FROM orders  GROUP BY customerNumber;

question: ax MSRP per product line
answer: SELECT productLine, MAX(MSRP) AS maxMSRP  FROM products  GROUP BY productLine;

question: in buy price per vendor
answer: SELECT productVendor, MIN(buyPrice) AS minPrice  FROM products  GROUP BY productVendor;

question: otal number of customers
answer: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCustomers FROM customers;

question: otal number of products
answer: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalProducts FROM products;

question: otal revenue from payments
answer: SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalRevenue FROM payments;

question: verage product price
answer: SELECT AVG(buyPrice) AS averagePrice FROM products;

question: ax payment amount
answer: SELECT MAX(amount) AS maxPayment FROM payments;

question: in payment amount
answer: SELECT MIN(amount) AS minPayment FROM payments;

question: ount total orders
answer: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders FROM orders;

question: otal quantity in stock
answer: SELECT SUM(quantityInStock) AS totalStock FROM products;

question: verage MSRP
answer: SELECT AVG(MSRP) AS averageMSRP FROM products;

question: umber of employees
answer: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalEmployees FROM employees;
